emails.subject: City of Shasta Lake Deal #509089
emails.body: City of Shasta Lake Deal #509089 Hi Kate, Please have a look at the term on this deal. There is a discrepancy between the end date at the top of the screen in Deal Entry and the one listed in the strips at the bottom. Is the correct end date 6/30 or 6/1? Thanks! Kim

emails.body: Re: City of Shasta Lake Deal #509089 I'm not sure if someone else got to this before I did, but I see the same end date at the top and bottom of this deal 6/30/01.
